'''竏喃-sh-h-r''' ('''kafasheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:velarise|velarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:velarise|velarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喃-sh-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kafasheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifasheroko|thifasheroko]] || [[word:jifasheroko|jifasheroko]] || [[word:shifasheroko|shifasheroko]] || [[word:kifasheroko|kifasheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufasheroko|thuthufasheroko]] || [[word:jujufasheroko|jujufasheroko]] || [[word:shushufasheroko|shushufasheroko]] || [[word:kukufasheroko|kukufasheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufasheroko|thufasheroko]] || [[word:jufasheroko|jufasheroko]] || [[word:shufasheroko|shufasheroko]] || [[word:kufasheroko|kufasheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufasheroko|thufasheroko]] || [[word:jufasheroko|jufasheroko]] || [[word:shufasheroko|shufasheroko]] || [[word:kufasheroko|kufasheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefasheroko|thefasheroko]] || [[word:jefasheroko|jefasheroko]] || [[word:shefasheroko|shefasheroko]] || [[word:kefasheroko|kefasheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofasheroko|thothofasheroko]] || [[word:jojofasheroko|jojofasheroko]] || [[word:shoshofasheroko|shoshofasheroko]] || [[word:kokofasheroko|kokofasheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofasheroko|thofasheroko]] || [[word:jofasheroko|jofasheroko]] || [[word:shofasheroko|shofasheroko]] || [[word:kofasheroko|kofasheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofasheroko|thofasheroko]] || [[word:jofasheroko|jofasheroko]] || [[word:shofasheroko|shofasheroko]] || [[word:kofasheroko|kofasheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦfasheroko|thﾃｦfasheroko]] || [[word:jﾃｦfasheroko|jﾃｦfasheroko]] || [[word:shﾃｦfasheroko|shﾃｦfasheroko]] || [[word:kﾃｦfasheroko|kﾃｦfasheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafasheroko|thathafasheroko]] || [[word:jajafasheroko|jajafasheroko]] || [[word:shashafasheroko|shashafasheroko]] || [[word:kakafasheroko|kakafasheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafasheroko|thafasheroko]] || [[word:jafasheroko|jafasheroko]] || [[word:shafasheroko|shafasheroko]] || [[word:kafasheroko|kafasheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafasheroko|thafasheroko]] || [[word:jafasheroko|jafasheroko]] || [[word:shafasheroko|shafasheroko]] || [[word:kafasheroko|kafasheroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
